$comment: Per-tool release metadata. Single source of truth for:
- hfrog software description / install_command / install_script_url / source_type
- Build matrix (which targets to build for this tool)
- cargo_features: list of features to enable on `cargo build` (default: none).
For tools that gate GUI behind a non-default feature (mj_atlas), include 'gui'
so the published binary can launch the GUI in addition to its CLI subcommands.
For tools where GUI is already in [features].default (maquette), this is redundant.
Edit this file when adding/removing a tool, NOT release.yml.

bulk_upload.description: High-speed batch file upload/download CLI for S3-compatible storage (AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Aliyun OSS, iDrive E2). Multi-threaded parallel transfers, resume capability, checksum verification.

img_resize.description: 图片批量缩放/压缩工具 — 多线程批量处理 JPEG/PNG/WebP，支持目标尺寸/质量/格式。

textexture.description: 艺术字图片生成（阴影/描边/渐变/发光/霓虹）— 一行 CLI 把任意文字渲染成可商用的 PNG 文字贴图。

mj_atlas.description: MJAtlas — 游戏 sprite 图集打包工具，UV-stable 增量构建、多边形 mesh、manifest 一等公民（inspect/diff/verify/tag）、可选 hfrog mirror、Godot native 输出。带 GUI 浏览器 + CLI 子命令双模。

looplog.description: 本地日志摄入 / 查询工具 — SQLite 落盘、24 小时短周期保留、loopback HTTP 协议、CLI JSON 查询，并提供微信小程序 AI 自主循环调试指南。

maquette.description: Kit-based low-poly 建模与导出工具 — GUI 堆方块，导出 glTF/OBJ 3D 模型与 2D sprite。

group_vibe_workbench.description: 桌面协作工作台 — GPUI + Murmur P2P，多人远程协同。

deskpet.description: 无边框透明置顶 3D 桌面宠物 — Bevy + bevy_egui，系统托盘 / macOS 菜单栏常驻，点击托盘显隐；穿透点击、随机游走、点击跳跃。无 .glb 资源时回退内置程序化史莱姆。
